subcodes.first_line: Rejoice thou in that We have made mention of thee and aided thee to turn unto this Cause, from which most have turned aside [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان افرح بما ذکرناک و ایدناک علی الاقبال الی هذا الامر الذی اعرض عنه اکثر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement
